---
title: "Interactive Explorer"
root: ".."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <!-- Leaflet (pinned to 1.9.4) -->
          <link rel="stylesheet"
                href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"
                integrity="sha256-p4NxAoJBhIIN+hmNHrzRCf9tD/miZyoHS5obTRR9BMY="
                crossorigin=""/>
          <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"
                  integrity="sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo="
                  crossorigin=""></script>
---

<div class="small-muted">
Use the <strong>person-in-a-city</strong> (left) to select a modality, then click a <strong>country</strong> or a <strong>continent</strong> on the map.
The panel on the right provides a brief overview and a <em>View more</em> link to a detailed page.
</div>

```{=html}
<script>
  // Used by assets/js/explorer.js to resolve paths to /data and /assets from any page depth
  window.AD_DIVERSITY_ROOT = "{{< meta root >}}";
</script>
```

<div class="explorer-layout">

  <div class="explorer-panel">
    <h3 style="margin-top:0">Select a modality</h3>

    <div class="person-wrap">
      <object id="personObject"
              data="{{< meta root >}}/assets/img/person_city.svg"
              type="image/svg+xml"
              aria-label="Person in a city diagram">
      </object>
    </div>

    <div class="modality-buttons" aria-label="Modality buttons (keyboard-friendly)">
      <button type="button" data-modality="neuroimaging">🧠 Neuroimaging</button>
      <button type="button" data-modality="genetics_proteomics">🧬 Genetics &amp; Proteomics</button>
      <button type="button" data-modality="exposomics">🌿 Exposomics</button>
      <button type="button" data-modality="all" class="active">✨ All modalities</button>
    </div>

    <div class="small-muted" style="margin-top:0.8rem">
      Clicking the SVG also works: <em>head</em> → neuroimaging, <em>arm vein</em> → genetics/proteomics, <em>environment</em> → exposomics.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div>
    <div class="explorer-toolbar">
      <div class="segmented" aria-label="Geography mode">
        <button type="button" id="modeCountries" class="active">Countries</button>
        <button type="button" id="modeContinents">Continents</button>
      </div>

      <div class="legend" id="legend"></div>
    </div>

    <div id="map" aria-label="Interactive map"></div>

    <div class="small-muted" style="margin-top:0.6rem">
      Map tiles © OpenStreetMap contributors.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="explorer-panel" id="infoPanel">
    <h3 class="info-title" style="margin-top:0">Click a region</h3>
    <div class="info-meta">Choose a modality (left), then click a country/continent.</div>
    <div class="small-muted">
      The Explorer is powered by <code>data/datasets.json</code> and <code>data/region_summaries.json</code>. Edit those files to update counts and text.
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

```{=html}
<script src="{{< meta root >}}/assets/js/explorer.js"></script>
```
